precondition: panel has been hard power-cycled or otherwise externally recovered from the current connect/sendme silent state; the latest local orchestrated recovery attempt was still silent

recommended_order.label: If the panel is still transport-silent, first verify the prepared desktop SD recovery bundle
Perform SD recovery, then use the prepared desktop follow-up entrypoint
If the follow-up run reaches the seed-side runner, inspect the D/?/A summary

notes: The desktop SD handoff bundle is now the most direct recovery entrypoint because the latest local orchestrated run and the public whmi-wri entry probe both stayed silent.
The text-select control is the strongest seed-side control sample, file-stream is second, and file-browser is the target falsification sample.
